description: Pipeline for adding or maintaining CI execution and trace artifacts.

stages.name: Configure suite
checks: Define npm script for local execution.
Use Playwright config with trace retain-on-failure by default.
Provide an opt-in trace-on command for full local trace capture.

stages.name: Add CI workflow
checks: Run on pull_request and push to protected branches.

stages.name: Validate
checks: Run the target test suite or a focused smoke subset.
